title: Find Missing Values in an Uploaded File
summary: Spot nulls and blanks after upload using preview, filters, and charts before analysis.

content.summary: Spot nulls and blanks after upload using preview, filters, and charts before analysis.

body.text: Missing values silently skew averages and break filters. Catch them in preview before trusting any chart. Scan preview for empty cells in critical columns—amount, date, customer ID. Filter for null or blank in those fields to count affected rows.

body.caption: Team meeting with presentation screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Scan preview for empty cells in critical columns—amount, date, customer ID. Filter for null or blank in those fields to count affected rows.
Chart missingness by category if gaps cluster in one region or product line—that signals process issues, not random noise.

items: Decide exclude vs impute before reporting totals.
Missing IDs may duplicate joins—fix upstream.
Document how many rows dropped due to nulls.

body.text: Fix source exports when possible. Otherwise save a rule excluding incomplete rows and note the impact on totals.
Talk to Data questions should mention whether nulls are included—align with your filter rules.
Missing-value checks belong in every Datilio upload ritual—thirty seconds that prevent embarrassing deck errors.

meta_description: Spot nulls and blanks after upload using preview, filters, and charts before analysis.
meta_keywords: Missing Data, Data Quality, Tutorial, CSV
